core_payload.content:
# N-Infinity Project

## 1. Dream Direction
The Dream branch pushes the founding idea of N-Infinity to its logical end. Human prompting remains precious and strategically decisive, but the real leap comes when the system can sustain thousands of bounded background iterations per day without collapsing into noise or runaway spend.

## 2. Desired Future State
- a denser `iteration_fabric` where mining, planning, refinery work, vault stewardship, review, repository execution, and promotion reinforce one another.
- stronger assignment control and control-plane visibility for every lane.
- richer day/night autonomy shaping instead of one generic always-on mode.
- clearer capsule-job economics, review bundles, and evidence thresholds before stronger promotion.
- a swarm that compounds graph work without burying the human under operational noise.

## 3. Why It Matters
Dream preserves N-Infinity as the long-horizon execution lattice of N1Hub rather than only the current family of helpers. It is the place where finite human attention is amplified into near-continuous graph work while the human remains the center of judgment.

neuro_concentrate.summary: N-Infinity Project in the Dream branch is the roadmap for a more capable and better-governed autonomous swarm. It imagines agents that not only react to planner and tracker signals, but coordinate continuously around mining, refinement, risk, synthesis, reminders, repository execution, contradiction handling, and graph curation without losing assignment visibility or auditability. Dream preserves the target state where N-Infinity becomes a real operational intelligence lattice rather than a partially implemented family of helpers.
